title: rhododendron cloiophorum subsp. roseotinctum
intro: Rhododendron cloiophorum subsp. roseotinctum, also known as the Tibetan rhododendron or rose-pink rhododendron, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron cloiophorum subsp. roseotinctum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Rhododendron cloiophorum subsp. roseotinctum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
